text: 'RHOBH’ Kathy Hilton Fighting Injured House Guest Over $$$ Demand - TMZ
fullText: 'Real Housewives of Beverly Hills' star Kathy Hilton said the house guest suing her over an alleged fall at her Bel Air mansion may have caused her own injuries ... TMZ has learned.

text: Appeals court limits abortion pill access nationwide - The Washington Post
fullText: A federal appeals court issued a ruling that would temporarily block people from accessing abortion pills through telehealth providers and via mail.

text: Live Updates: Trump "not satisfied" with new peace deal offered by Iran as standoff's costs multiply - CBS News
fullText: Iran said it had offered a new proposal to the U.S. to end the war, as the Strait of Hormuz standoff sends costs soaring around the world.

text: Late Cleveland turnover, improbable 3-pointer send Raptors past Cavs 112-110 in overtime to force Game 7 - Cleveland.com
fullText: The Cavs were outlasted by the Raptors, 112-110, in overtime of Game 6 at Scotiabank Arena. The best-of-seven series is tied at 3-3, with the finale Sunday in Cleveland.

text: FDA expands access to a promising drug for one of the worst cancers - The Washington Post
fullText: More patients will be able to take the pill while it is under review, as the agency cited the dire need for a drug to fight one of the most lethal cancers.

text: NYC May Day: Protests and rallies take place across five boroughs - ABC7 New York
fullText: Hundreds of demonstrators poured into Washington Square Park in Greenwich Village determined to take a stand against large corporations and to stand up for organized labor.

text: Pistons fight back from 24 down, force Game 7 vs. Magic with epic comeback - MLive.com
fullText: An all-time defensive showing in the second half opened the door for the Pistons to survive another elimination game.

text: Pirro says video shows moment gunman fired outside correspondents’ dinner - The Washington Post
fullText: Defense attorneys for the alleged gunman have questioned the evidence in the case, and the U.S. attorney’s X posts go beyond what prosecutors have said in court filings.

text: Trump Orders the Withdrawal of 5,000 U.S. Troops From Germany - WSJ
Jodie Sweetin Received One-Cent Residual Check For ‘Full House’: “It’s All In Streaming” - Deadline
fullText: How rude! Jodie Sweetin's latest residual check from 'Full House' sure isn't buying her a San Francisco townhouse anytime soon.

text: ‘What’s a more secure place than The Villages?’: Trump finds his people again in Florida - Politico
fullText: The event had the feel of a pep rally for the president at a time when his popularity is flagging, even in Florida.

text: Tennessee and Alabama take steps to redraw House maps in wake of Supreme Court ruling - CBS News
fullText: The Republican governors of Tennessee and Alabama called state lawmakers into special sessions on Friday, initial steps in what could be a scramble to redraw congressional maps after the Supreme Court narrowed the Voting Rights Act.

text: Post Malone and Jelly Roll’s Tiger Stadium concert canceled, artist says in social media post - The Advocate
fullText: The two singers were scheduled to perform at Tiger Stadium on May 23.

text: What passengers need to know about Spirit Airlines - CNN
fullText: Thousands of Spirit Airlines passengers are facing a chaotic weekend as the budget carrier announced it’s halting all flights as of early Saturday after days of mounting shutdown concerns.

text: Google Photos' New AI Tool Will Help You Picture Yourself in All Your Clothes - CNET
fullText: The Google Photos wardrobe feature uses AI to scan your camera roll and create a digital version of your closet.

text: NASA to increase value of CLPS contract to support surge of lunar lander missions - SpaceNews
fullText: NASA is planning to increase the total value of a contract for robotic lunar lander missions to support a proposed surge in flights for a moon base.

text: Study: AI models that consider user's feeling are more likely to make errors - Ars Technica
fullText: Overtuning can cause models to "prioritize user satisfaction over truthfulness.”...
